name: Tidehunter
description: You can't hide from the tide. Leviathan, the Tidehunter The Anchor is always created 50-distance next to Tidehunter, and travels to the unit-targeted enemy unit.

abilities.name: Gush
abilities.description: Damages the unit-targeted enemy, and reduces its movement speed and armor. Gush becomes a ground-targeted wave ability that affects enemy units in a line. Reduces cooldown.

abilities.name: Kraken Shell
abilities.description: Temporarily hardens Tidehunter's hide further, reducing even more physical attack damage with a trade-off. grants Tidehunter permanent flat bonus damage block per enemy hero kill with the Anchor Smash debuff applied. Not Breakable.

abilities.name: Anchor Smash
abilities.description: Instantly attacks and reduces all enemy units' main attack damage within the radius.

abilities.name: Dead in the Water
abilities.description: Attaches and leashes a heavy anchor to an enemy hero. Attempting to move a certain distance from the anchor sets its movement speed value and forces the affected unit to drag the Anchor behind them. This unit does not feel the effects from magical spell damage sources.

abilities.name: Ravage
abilities.description: Damages and stuns all enemy units within the radius.
